title: ASTS IPO History: New Providence SPAC Merger and Public Trading
text: On April 6, 2021, New Providence Acquisition Corp. and AST & Science LLC completed a $1.4 billion business combination to become AST SpaceMobile and began trading on NASDAQ under ASTS and ASTSW. The deal valued the combined company at $1.4 billion and provided it with $462 million in gross proceeds. In September 2019, New Providence Acquisition Corp. completed a $230 million initial public offering of 23 million units, each consisting of one Class A ordinary share and one-half warrant. AST SpaceMobile is building the first space-based cellular broadband network to operate directly with standard, unmodified mobile devices based on extensive IP and patent portfolio. The company's team of engineers and space scientists aims to eliminate connectivity gaps faced by five billion mobile subscribers and bring broadband to billions who remain unconnected. AST SpaceMobile and New Providence secured a commitment for a $230 million private placement investment from Vodafone Group PLC, Rakuten Inc., American Tower Corp., and UBS Group AG's hedge fund arm.
